prompt:
Goal: Create a highly detailed vertical photorealistic miniature diorama inside a clear glass display case, styled like a warm pastel Japanese kawaii room box, with the feeling of a cozy personal world.

Canvas: Portrait 2:3 composition, close-up front view through transparent glass, shallow depth of field, warm golden afternoon light, soft bokeh fairy lights, ultra-detailed handcrafted textures, realistic reflections on the acrylic/glass walls.

Main subject: A seated teenage girl miniature with a softly obscured/featureless face, shoulder-length dark brown hair, wearing a cream Japanese sailor school uniform with gray collar trim, a large pink chest bow, gray pleated skirt, white socks, sitting sideways on a cream lace-covered armchair. Her left arm reaches outward holding a tiny pink flower or wand-like blossom; her right hand rests on her knee. Pose is gentle, relaxed, and inviting.

Companion subject: One small floating fairy-like robot girl to the right of the seated girl, also with a softly obscured/featureless face, short brown bob hair, translucent insect wings, white-and-silver futuristic body armor, tiny mechanical limbs, hovering above a small round flying base. Make it cute, delicate, and toy-like rather than threatening.

Display case and room: The scene is enclosed in a rectangular glass case with a wooden base and ornate gold vine decoration along the bottom. Inside is a miniature living room with a sofa/armchair, lace curtains, sunny window, bookshelves, framed photos, houseplants, cushions, a small wooden coffee table, pastel boxes, a cup and saucer, tiny cosmetics or perfume bottles, and a soft cream rug. Use peach, ivory, blush pink, champagne gold, and pale green as the main palette.

Decorative arch: At the top front of the case is a floral arch made of vines, pearls, crystal drops, warm micro string lights, and many small white and pink flowers. Add one ornate oval sign centered at the top reading まるこのおうち時間, with a small cursive English subtitle reading "Maruko's little world". Add one matching name plaque near the bottom front reading まるこ with "Maruko" underneath.

Counted visible focal elements: Include exactly 2 human-like figures: 1 seated schoolgirl miniature and 1 floating winged robot fairy. Include exactly 1 sleeping white cat curled in a small woven basket on the floor near the girl's feet. Include exactly 2 readable signs: the top oval title sign and the bottom name plaque. Include exactly 1 small wooden coffee table, 1 cup-and-saucer set, 1 armchair, 1 window with lace curtains, and 1 wooden display-case base.

Style and lighting: Premium collectible dollhouse photography, hyperrealistic miniature craftsmanship, romantic kawaii aesthetic, cinematic warm sunlight from the back window, glowing fairy lights, crisp foreground details with soft background blur, glass reflections and refractions, delicate lace, pearl, resin, and gold-metal textures.

Constraints: Do not add extra characters, do not make it a flat illustration, do not use harsh colors, avoid horror or cyberpunk mood, keep both faces intentionally soft/blurred and non-identifiable, preserve the cute handcrafted display-case look.
